overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a foggy Night City street at night, passing crashed vehicles and pedestrians before crossing a busy intersection. The scene features neon-lit digital billboards, palm trees, and a hazy cyberpunk atmosphere with artificial street lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the right side of the sidewalk past a crashed vehicle

entered.detail: white crashed car or debris on the left side of the sidewalk
large illuminated billboard with colorful advertisements glowing in the fog
tall palm trees lining the street against the night sky
tall street lamp casting yellow light through the haze

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk at night, passing a crashed white vehicle on the left. Digital billboards glow in the distance through the fog, while palm trees and street lights line the path.

events.description: character turns left and crosses to the left side of the walkway near the grassy area

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking along the left side of the path near trees and debris

notable_agents.action: pedestrian sitting or crouching near the grassy embankment on the left

entered.detail: grassy slope with scattered trees and urban debris

segments.scene_description: The character turns left, moving toward a grassy embankment with scattered trees. The crashed vehicle falls behind as the path continues past more digital billboards visible through the foliage.

events.description: traffic lights become visible ahead as the character approaches the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking past various pedestrians while approaching the intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket talking on phone while walking
pedestrian in yellow jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: traffic signal showing red light at the intersection ahead
dark mountain silhouette visible in the background beyond the city

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians including one in a red jacket on the phone. Traffic lights and a distant mountain become visible through the fog as the intersection approaches.

events.description: waiting at red light with group of pedestrians at the crosswalk
crossing the multi-lane street with the crowd

agents.ego_description: waiting at the intersection then crossing the street with a group of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians waiting at the corner and crossing together

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing painted on the asphalt
tall building with neon signage and number 07 illuminated on the facade
large billboard structure spanning across the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the intersection and waits with a crowd of pedestrians at the red light. After the light changes, the group crosses the multi-lane street together, passing under large overhead billboards toward a commercial building with bright neon signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy urban corridor that transitions from a desolate roadside into a bustling, neon-lit city intersection. It begins by following a character along a concrete sidewalk past a crashed white vehicle, with digital billboards glowing faintly through the haze and palm trees lining the path. As the character turns left, the scene shifts toward a grassy embankment where the wreckage falls behind and the foliage partially obscures the distant electronic displays. The camera then continues forward, passing pedestrians and a person in a red jacket as the fog thins to reveal traffic lights and a distant mountain. Finally, the movement culminates at a crowded intersection where the group waits for a red light before crossing a multi-lane street toward a commercial building adorned with bright neon signage.
